'''âk-p-j''' ('''kapaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camber|camber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camber|camber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-j
|-
! Lemma
| kapaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapajithi|kapajithi]] || [[word:kapajiji|kapajiji]] || [[word:kapajishi|kapajishi]] || [[word:kapaji|kapaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapajuthuth|kapajuthuth]] || [[word:kapajujuj|kapajujuj]] || [[word:kapajushush|kapajushush]] || [[word:kapaj|kapaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapajuthu|kapajuthu]] || [[word:kapajuju|kapajuju]] || [[word:kapajushu|kapajushu]] || [[word:kapaju|kapaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapajufuth|kapajufuth]] || [[word:kapajufuj|kapajufuj]] || [[word:kapajufush|kapajufush]] || [[word:kapajuf|kapajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapajethe|kapajethe]] || [[word:kapajeje|kapajeje]] || [[word:kapajeshe|kapajeshe]] || [[word:kapaje|kapaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapajothoth|kapajothoth]] || [[word:kapajojoj|kapajojoj]] || [[word:kapajoshosh|kapajoshosh]] || [[word:kapaj|kapaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapajotho|kapajotho]] || [[word:kapajojo|kapajojo]] || [[word:kapajosho|kapajosho]] || [[word:kapajo|kapajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapajofoth|kapajofoth]] || [[word:kapajofoj|kapajofoj]] || [[word:kapajofosh|kapajofosh]] || [[word:kapajof|kapajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapajĂŠthĂŠ|kapajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kapajĂŠjĂŠ|kapajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kapajĂŠshĂŠ|kapajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kapajĂŠ|kapajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapajathath|kapajathath]] || [[word:kapajajaj|kapajajaj]] || [[word:kapajashash|kapajashash]] || [[word:kapaj|kapaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapajatha|kapajatha]] || [[word:kapajaja|kapajaja]] || [[word:kapajasha|kapajasha]] || [[word:kapaja|kapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapajafath|kapajafath]] || [[word:kapajafaj|kapajafaj]] || [[word:kapajafash|kapajafash]] || [[word:kapajaf|kapajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kapajasha|kapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokapajasha|gokapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikapajasha|gokikapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kapajnĂŒsha|kapajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokapajnknĂŒsha|gokapajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikapajnĂŒsha|gokikapajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kapajshĂ«sha|kapajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokapajnkshĂ«sha|gokapajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikapajshĂ«sha|gokikapajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapajrosha|kapajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapajnkrosha|gokapajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapajrosha|gokikapajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kapajmusha|kapajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapajnkmusha|gokapajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapajmusha|gokikapajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kapajsherasha|kapajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokapajnksherasha|gokapajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikapajsherasha|gokikapajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kapajngasha|kapajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokapajnkngasha|gokapajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikapajngasha|gokikapajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kapajyasha|kapajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokapajnkyasha|gokapajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikapajyasha|gokikapajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kapajyamasha|kapajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokapajnkyamasha|gokapajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikapajyamasha|gokikapajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapajnĂŒshĂ«sha|kapajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokapajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikapajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapajnĂŒrosha|kapajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapajnknĂŒrosha|gokapajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapajnĂŒrosha|gokikapajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapajnĂŒmusha|kapajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapajnknĂŒmusha|gokapajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapajnĂŒmusha|gokikapajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapajshĂ«nĂŒsha|kapajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokapajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikapajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapajshĂ«rosha|kapajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapajnkshĂ«rosha|gokapajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapajshĂ«rosha|gokikapajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapajshĂ«musha|kapajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapajnkshĂ«musha|gokapajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapajshĂ«musha|gokikapajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapajronĂŒsha|kapajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapajnkronĂŒsha|gokapajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapajronĂŒsha|gokikapajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapajroshĂ«sha|kapajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapajnkroshĂ«sha|gokapajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapajroshĂ«sha|gokikapajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapajromusha|kapajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapajnkromusha|gokapajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapajromusha|gokikapajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapajmunĂŒsha|kapajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapajnkmunĂŒsha|gokapajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapajmunĂŒsha|gokikapajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapajmushĂ«sha|kapajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapajnkmushĂ«sha|gokapajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapajmushĂ«sha|gokikapajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapajmurosha|kapajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapajnkmurosha|gokapajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapajmurosha|gokikapajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kapaj|kapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠj|kĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokapaj|hokapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠpĂŠj|hokĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokapaj|hohokapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠpĂŠj|hohokĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkapaj|nĂŒkapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠpĂŠj|nĂŒkĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkapaj|nĂŒnĂŒkapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠpĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkapaj|nĂŻkapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠpĂŠj|nĂŻkĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkapaj|nĂŻnĂŻkapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠpĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukapaj|lukapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠpĂŠj|lukĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukapaj|lulukapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠpĂŠj|lulukĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likapaj|likapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠpĂŠj|likĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikapaj|lilikapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠpĂŠj|lilikĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokapaj|kokapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠpĂŠj|kokĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokapaj|kokokapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠpĂŠj|kokokĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekapaj|kekapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠpĂŠj|kekĂŠpĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekapaj|kekekapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠpĂŠj|kekekĂŠpĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
